name: Result.Extra

values.name: combine
values.comment: Combine a list of results into a single result (holding a list).
values.type: List (Result x a) -> Result x (List a)

values.name: extract
values.comment:
Turn a `Result e a` to an `a`, by applying the conversion
function specified to the `e`.

values.name: isErr
values.comment: Check whether the result is `Err` without unwrapping it.

values.name: isOk
values.comment: Check whether the result is `Ok` without unwrapping it.

values.name: mapBoth
values.comment:
Convert a `Result e a` to a `b` by applying either a function
if the `Result` is an `Err` or a function if the `Result` is `Ok`.
Both of these functions must return the same type.
values.type: (e -> b) -> (a -> b) -> Result e a -> b
